reviews.title: Bad Apartment
reviews.text:
I was very disappointed, because when I stayed at the apartment, electricity suddenly went out because there was a problem in the heating and when the night went out, I contacted the center contact, but no one answered and I was advised to call the emergency number by the telephone voice mailbox.  but it was not answered ... I had to walk and ask the other occupants for an emergency and finally the building security helped me, but it didn't solve the problem either ... and as long as I stayed here, I was cold because there was no heating, I was only given a blanket  ... and then after checking out, 2 days later I was charged AUD 121 without me knowing where to go?  and I have complained via email, but I have not replied to this 5 June 2019... and then i review and complained through Google Maps review and then they answered my review that the AUD 121 charged because i make their mattress full of urine... 

It doesn't make sense, because we checked and cleaned all the rooms including the beds and blankets all, and not the little ones or baby with us in the room ... how can they said the mattress is full of urine? I need them to give me the photos to prove it... And i'm really need to complain through AGODA too, to solve this charged.

Disappointing accommodation, room was dirty (mould in bathrooms,  dirty light switches and handles, dust around apartment), very basic (not even kitchen tongs) and dated. I had to clean the room on arrival as best I could with limited supplies.

Lifts kept breaking, out of 4 lift to our tower at times only 1 worked. No social distancing and never saw anyone cleaning door handles, lift buttons during our stay. 

Facilities were good, kids enjoyed the pool area and location was good for getting to cavil ave. 

Unfortunately I wouldn't recommend staying here.

The house needs a lot of maintenance. The dishwasher would not take the tablet. There was no light in the main bedroom, and when we complained, there was no response from the property manager. The shower screen in the bathroom was not opening completely, very inconvenient. 
Largest hot plate on the cooktop did not work. 
The appliances were not clean... 
we had to clean them before we could use them. You had to wait for lift for 10-15 min at some times (both going up and down) we were allocated a fix parking number, but then we found out that we had a to find a parking, which was a process in it self. In a couple of occasions there were none left so had to go and complain to the on ground security.

reviews.title: Careful when you read the amenities prvided
reviews.text:
Pros : Location good for family 
Cons : Amenities provided is only sufficient for a day even i paid 8days stays full rate.. 

Management of ghcr were not hospitable like all others places i have booked before. Everything u request even 2 hrs earlier check in, they request to top up rental.. Whereby i already top up 1 full day rental for my late departure.
When i request for at least 1 more pack of wash detergent so i can keep their apartment clean, they start to talk about charges. We only stayed a week & they expect us to buy a big bottle of dishwash detergent in supermarket.

Out of sudden the second day they request us to let their maintainence guy to fix their sliding door which they said is defect. My question to them is why do they not repair it before we arrive or arrange after we leave? We came to know they have key to access.

Management ghcr made us felt insecure staying in their apartment.

reviews.title: Hotel was nice but wouldn’t book with gchr
reviews.text: Hotel amenities and facilities were fine . My room was very basic looking but that’s ok . My experience with gchr was well below expectations . They firstly give me the wrong alloyed car space which left me looking for it in the car park with two young children screaming for 40 mins . Only to be told the next daythey gave me the wrong pass and I will need to come to them and swap it . They made the error I would think they would come to reception and swap it. Also internet was on the listing (unlimited wifi ), I was advised technician will be in the following day . Tech came and apparently didn’t have a cable so he left . After me following up and airing my disappointment I was told it’s not a given u get wifi !? Never heard anything again and as we need internet for business, I had to use the data from my phone which left me with additional charges to pay . Had they advised before hand no internet I would not have booked with them . Also tv was out of service. Won’t book with them

reviews.text: On the upside the apartment was well priced. A number of factors detracted from the overall experience. Firstly the beds had the most uncomfortable mattresses and nobody in the family of 6 could get a decent night sleep the whole week.  Secondly only one of the tv's actually worked so we were constantly fighting with the kids over remote. Lastly, the instructions on finding the apartment is horrendous as it only tells you instructions on how to find your car park, as we flew to GC and had a private transfer we spent over 2 hours trying to locate the apartment. Arriving after hours didnt help I guess but they really need to do a better job. If they could rectify these issues, it actually would be a pretty good place to stay and I would recommend.

reviews.title: Most unpleasant stay with HRSP
reviews.positives: The location, we've stayed at the Chevron Renaaissance a few times and love the location. We will still stay CR, but not through HRSP.
reviews.negatives: The apartment was very poorly maintained, the management company was very slow to respond to issues and unresponsive at times. The dishwasher was leaking before we even used it and ended up being broken. So we had to handwash our dishes which was an inconvenience as the sink didn't have a dish drainer and the dish rack didn't have a tray so water ended up going everywhere. We had to constantly wipe dry the bench and dishes as we went which made the whole dish washing process take a whole lot longer. Lights weren't working, which they fixed a few days after being notified. Not much crockery or plates for serving. Really, it was only the bare minimum. The main bedroom aircon was set at 24-26°C during our summer heatwave.  I tried to change it but was unable to make it coole, hence we weren't able to have a good night's sleep due to the stuffiness and hit room. Opening the windows helped a little bit, but it was very, very windy and the head of the bed is directly in front of the window opening.

reviews.title: A rose with a few thorns
reviews.positives: The views are beautiful, either beach or mountains.
reviews.negatives:
Allow an extra 45 minutes either side of check-in and check-out — not for relaxing, but to navigate the car park, multiple traffic lights, delays at loading zones, and eventually locate a barely-signed office with a small wall safe in a window. Inside the safe are envelopes with apartment keys for various properties. You’re instructed (via text) to only take the envelope with your name and code.

Even if you’ve paid in full through Booking.com, you’ll receive additional texts asking for personal details, including email, contact info, and credit card details via an external link. Booking.com confirmed this is standard practice for “unmanned” or outsourced operators, but it still feels insecure given how common online scams are.

The apartment itself was hit and miss.
	•	The oven didn’t work at all. Yes, we checked the switch, the fuse box, and tried everything.
	•	The dryer worked sporadically, at best.
	•	In the master bedroom, the door seals were either old or missing entirely — the wind sounded like a freight train all night. (No issues in the twin bedroom next door.)

The lagoon pool and spas were fantastic and a clear highlight. The kids had a great time.
The location is unbeatable if you want to be in the heart of everything.
And the lorikeets visiting the balconies across the towers were a lovely surprise — the kids even fed them fruit one morning.

reviews.positives: The location was excellent, as was ease of access (picking up the key etc). The size of the apartment was great. The view was excellent.
reviews.negatives:
I really didn’t like that there were broken sliding door locks to a few of the balconies - only one had a working lock. We had a teenager who sleepwalks and this property was on the 40th floor. These locks should be fixed immediately. Anyone with kids would want to be able to lock those door at night. 

The lifts were TERRIBLE. We wired 20 minutes or more. They were very slow, I think because one wasn’t working.

The TV in the master bedroom only works on shot four free-to-air channels. No streaming services. That was hugely disappointing and for the money you pay for the apartment, this should work. 

The ensuite bathroom doors don’t work properly- one won’t close and the other one is hard to push back one you do pull it out.

The owners should consider putting some basic pantry staples in, like salt and pepper. They needed more dishwashing and laundry detergent rather than one tiny sachet of each. 

There was a terrible lack of hangars, not enough to hang clothing for a week. 

The apartment needs a bit of upkeep, it looks a bit shabby. The pool area definitely needs to be up-kept better - the paint needs re doing and some of the facade of the rocks was chipping off.
